Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows mild hypoglycemia, elevated creatinine suggesting impaired renal function, mild hyperchloremia, low globulin, elevated ALT, and low AST. Liver synthetic function appears preserved. These findings may indicate chronic kidney disease with possible mild liver enzyme disturbance. Clinical correlation and further evaluation of renal and hepatic status are recommended.
